heading: Design of NOAA vessels
label: 891c Design of NOAA vessels
notes: Amendments2025—Subsec. (a). , substituted “acting through the Assistant Administrator of NOAA for Marine and Aviation Operations” for “working through the Office of the NOAA Corps Operations and the Systems Procurement Office” in introductory provisions.Pub. L. 119–60, § 8402(a)(3)(A), substituted “, acting through the Assistant Administrator of NOAA for Marine and Aviation Operations, shall submit to the Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation of the Senate and the Committee on Natural Resources and the Committee on Science, Space, and Technology of the House of Representatives,” for “shall—Pub. L. 119–60, § 8402(a)(3)(B)“(1) report to Congress identifying any existing vessel design or design proposal that meets the requirements of the Plan within 30 days after , and shall promptly advise the Congress of any modification of these designs; andOctober 29, 1992“(2) submit to Congress”,and struck out “subsequent” before “existing vessel design”.

L. 119–60, § 8402(a)(3)(B)“(1) report to Congress identifying any existing vessel design or design proposal that meets the requirements of the Plan within 30 days after , and shall promptly advise the Congress of any modification of these designs; andOctober 29, 1992“(2) submit to Congress”,and struck out “subsequent” before “existing vessel design”.

children.text: prepare requirements for each class of vessel to be constructed or converted under the Plan; and
contract competitively from nongovernmental entities with expertise in shipbuilding for vessel design and construction based on the requirements for each class of vessel to be acquired.

children.heading: Exception
children.label: b Exception
children.text: The Secretary, acting through the Assistant Administrator of NOAA for Marine and Aviation Operations, shall submit to the Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation of the Senate and the Committee on Natural Resources and the Committee on Science, Space, and Technology of the House of Representatives, as part of the annual update of the Plan required in , any existing vessel design or design proposals that meet the requirements of the Plan.section 891b of this title
